fieldData.name: Series 7630/7675
fieldData.description:
With a .29 U-value for standard low-E, argon-filled dual-pane glass, a performance grade of CW-PG100 at sizes up to 60″ x 120″, and a mulling process that keeps sightlines narrow, the Series 7630 Window Wall is optimized for performance, flexibility, and versatility. Create a single panel, door size, or wall-sized opening – or mull with Performance Line ventilating window and hinged or sliding glass doors for limitless expression.

Series 7630 Window Wall

  • Extreme panel sizes
  • Industry-leading U-factors
  • Narrow sightlines
  • Highly configurable
  • Low-E glass, dual-paned
  • Thermally broken aluminum

Performance

Able to deliver energy efficiency in a variety of weather conditions, the Series 7630 Window Wall features a .29 U-value for standard low-E, argon-filled dual-pane glass. A signature aluminum extrusion design utilizing proprietary Insulbar technology further reduces energy consumption. Compliant with California’s rigorous Title 24 requirements.

Strength

Western Window Systems’ Series 7630 Window Wall achieves a performance grade of CW-PG100 at sizes up to 60″ x 120″. (CW-PG100 includes a design pressure of 100 pounds per square foot, the equivalent of 200 mph winds.)

Mulling

The mulling process for the Series 7630 Window Wall keeps sightlines narrow, resulting in a clean, contemporary look that can be replicated through an entire wall of glass. For even more customization, a 5.875″ frame depth allows Performance Line sliding doors, ventilating windows, and hinged doors to directly mull to any combination of windows.
fieldData.long-description: With a .29 U-value for standard low-E, argon-filled dual-pane glass, a performance grade of CW-PG100 at sizes up to 60″ x 120″, and a mulling process that keeps sightlines narrow, the Series 7630 Window Wall is optimized for performance, flexibility, and versatility. The non-operational Series 7675 Fixed Window is designed to maximize viewing areas and bring more light into a room. It is commonly used in conjunction with casement and awning windows, which open for airflow.

Mulling

A versatile 4.5″ deep framing system allows Western Window Systems’ Series 900 Hinged Doors, Series 600 Sliding Glass Doors, and Series 670 hinged windows to directly mull to any combination of windows, creating a clean, smooth appearance.

Configurations and Sizes

fieldData.name: StormBreaker Plus
fieldData.description:
Simonton StormBreaker Plus® windows and doors deliver top-tier impact protection, energy efficiency, and coastal durability—perfect for homes in hurricane-prone and high-velocity wind zones. These windows are engineered to withstand extreme weather while offering sleek and customizable options to suit any home style.

Key Features:

  • Certified for Coastal Protection
    Meets stringent building codes including Florida Building Commission Missile D standards, Texas Department of Insurance, and select High-Velocity Hurricane Zone (HVHZ) certifications for Miami-Dade and Broward County.‍
  • Impact-Resistant SafePoint® Max Glass
    Laminated glass with a strong interlayer protects against windborne debris—even if the outer pane breaks, the interlayer holds everything in place. It also reduces noise by up to 50%, blocks up to 99% of UV rays, and enhances security.‍
  • Built for Durability & Weather Resistance
    Reinforced vinyl profiles and fusion-welded frames withstand harsh coastal conditions—extreme temperatures, humidity, salt air, and insects. Specialized sill designs help resist water infiltration.‍
  • Comfort & Energy Efficiency
    Features include ProSolar® Low-E glass, Argon or optional Krypton gas fills, and advanced spacer systems like Intercept® or Super Spacer® to boost insulation and lower energy bills.‍
  • Design Flexibility
    Available in white, tan, and bronze exterior finishes, with various grille options and attractive beveled frames. Operable models (double-hung, sliding, casement, specialty shapes) include durable hardware and extruded screens.‍
  • Reliable Warranty
    Comes with a robust Lifetime Limited Warranty covering vinyl, hardware, and screens, as well as long-term glass unit protection.

Perfect For:
Homeowners in coastal or hurricane-prone areas who require maximum protection, energy efficiency, and customizable, low-maintenance style.

With a refined appearance and customizable options, these windows are ideal for homeowners who want the look of traditional wood windows without the maintenance.

Built with advanced insulation features and strong vinyl construction, the 5500 Series delivers excellent thermal performance and noise reduction—making it a smart investment in comfort, beauty, and value.

Key Features:

  • Premium vinyl construction for strength, durability, and low maintenance
  • ENERGY STAR® certified with optional ProSolar® Low-E glass packages
  • Multi-chambered profiles and fusion-welded corners for thermal efficiency
  • Traditional beveled frame design for classic curb appeal
  • Available in double hung, slider, casement, awning, bay, bow, picture, and specialty shapes
  • Variety of interior woodgrain finishes and exterior color options
  • Optional Decorum® hardware, grids, and glass enhancements
  • Lifetime Limited Warranty for peace of mind

Perfect For:
Homeowners seeking high-performance vinyl windows with customizable style and superior energy efficiency for new construction or replacement projects.
fieldData.long-description: Traditional window design defined by superior strength, a wide selection of styles, advanced energy efficiency, and exclusive features.
fieldData.advantage-description-1: Classic beveled frame design complements any architectural style.
fieldData.advantage-description-2: Select styles recognized as Most Efficient of ENERGY STAR® in 2024.
fieldData.advantage-description-3: Bring your vision to life with our wide range of colors, interior woodgrains and hardware finishes.
fieldData.about-collection-description: The Simonton 5500 Double Hung window has received the Good Housekeeping Seal in recognition of its uncompromising quality, exceptional energy efficiency and robust safety and security features.

fieldData.name: Asure
fieldData.description:
Simonton Asure™ Series Windows are engineered to offer a sleek, modern look with broad views and increased natural light—without compromising performance or comfort. Featuring a contemporary narrow-frame design, these all-vinyl windows are ideal for homeowners seeking a streamlined aesthetic on a budget.

Built with energy-efficient glass packages (including ProSolar® Low-E, Argon fill, and Intercept® spacers), Asure windows provide solid thermal performance along with visibility advantages. Fusion-welded construction ensures durability, while pocket replacements offer easy installation with minimal disruption. Backed by Simonton’s Double-Lifetime Limited Warranty, they deliver long-term value and peace of mind. Simonton

Key Features:

  • Narrow-frame design for expanded viewing area and enhanced daylight Simonton
  • Standard energy-efficient ProSolar® Low-E glass, Argon gas, and Intercept® spacer system
  • Fusion-welded vinyl frames and sashes for strength and weathertight performance
  • Styles include double-hung, sliding, picture, and specialty shapes
  • Classic finishes in white or tan, with matching hardware and grille options
  • Easy-update installation via pocket replacement windows
  • Entry-level pricing—costs range approximately $300–$450 per window, installed
  • Backed by a Double-Lifetime Limited Warranty for long-term coverage

Perfect For:
Homeowners and remodelers wanting a stylish, budget-friendly vinyl window that balances contemporary design with efficient, dependable performance.
fieldData.long-description: Narrow frame design adds a modern touch while bringing abundant daylight into a room without sacrificing energy efficiency and comfort.

fieldData.advantage-description-2: Energy-efficient options help reduce heating and cooling costs and maintain interior comfort.
fieldData.advantage-description-3: Essential color selection includes white and tan vinyl and color-matched grilles.
fieldData.about-collection-description: From the streamlined styling to effortless ease of use, Simonton Asure vinyl windows with weather resistance and thermal efficiencies are an ideal choice for your home.

Durability

Thanks to their rigidity and durability, the A250 windows can be configured into combinations with a large glazing area for maximum views. What’s more, they beautifully accentuate the clean, thin lines of contemporary design.
